thread.title: Minister Torres announces a joint complaint by the PSOE against Aldama for insults and slander

author: admin_l6ma5gus
title: Minister Torres announces a joint complaint by the PSOE against Aldama for insults and slander
text:
Tranquility in Moncloa because “absolutely nothing” that could compromise Pedro Sánchez will not come to light He accuses Feijóo of being “the spokesperson for a confessed criminal” and invites him to present the motion of censure against Sánchez, although he does not believe he dares. EP
11/22/2024
Updated at 5:24 p.m.
The Minister of Territorial Policy, Angel Victor Torres announced this Friday from the La Moncloa press room that the PSOE has filed a joint complaint against Víctor de Aldama for insults and slander, after the commissioner’s explosive statement. The …
